■ Position Status   Position Check RangeEXPRESSION옵셋'' = 70  DL00000 = 70;'DL00002' = 10  DL00002 = 10;'DL00004' = 100  DL00004 = 100;H50.28:Position Status_Unit8 (SP)00/0[ DL00002 ].../0043.../0046IF'SCT Use'MB00018111/6STR1 Y   STR1Y Standby PosEXPRESSION하한치옵셋'' = 'ML63202' - STR2Z 2 Pos Carry In Befor Pos EXPRESSION하한치옵셋'' = 'ML60406' - 'GL51106'  - ''  DL00020 = ML60406 - GL51106  - DL00000;상한치옵셋'' = 'ML60406' - 'GL51106' + ''  DL00022 = ML60406 - GL51106 + DL00000;NL25084/323[ DL00022 ].../0013w.../0016.../0020.../0030w.../0033.../0037.../0047w.../0050.../0054.../0064w.../0067.../0071.../0081w.../0084.../0088.../0098w.../0101.../0105.../0115w.../0118.../0122.../0132w.../0135.../0139.../0151w.../0154.../0158.../0170w.../0173.../0177.../0187w.../0190.../0194.../0204w.../0207.../0214w.../0217.../0224w.../0227.../0234w.../0237.../0248w.../0251.../0258w.../0261.../0268w.../0271.../0278w.../0281.../0288w.../0291.../0298w.../0301.../0308w.../0311.../0318w.../0321.../0333.../0342w.../0345RCHK[WLFQD]InIL8116LOCX~Machine coordinate feedback-[WLFQD]LowerDL00020하한치[WLFQD]UpperDL00022상한치MB076018STR1 Z 2 Pos Carry In Before PosNL25185/331[ MB076018 ].../0162wSTR2 Z Carry In Vacuum Retry PosEXPRESSION하한치옵셋'' = 'ML60406' - 'GL51102'  - ''  DL00020 = ML60406 - GL51102  - DL00000;상한치옵셋'' = 'ML60406' - 'GL51102' + ''  DL00022 = ML60406 - GL51102 + DL00000;NL25287/335[ DL00022 ].../0013w.../0016.../0020.../0030w.../0033.../0037.../0047w.../0050.../0054.../0064w.../0067.../0071.../0081w.../0084.../0088.../0098w.../0101.../0105.../0115w.../0118.../0122.../0132w.../0135.../0139.../0151w.../0154.../0158.../0170w.../0173.../0177.../0187w.../0190.../0194.../0204w.../0207.../0214w.../0217.../0224w.../0227.../0234w.../0237.../0248w.../0251.../0258w.../0261.../0268w.../0271.../0278w.../0281.../0288w.../0291.../0298w.../0301.../0308w.../0311.../0318w.../0321.../0330w.../0333.../0345RCHK[WLFQD]InIL8116LOCX~Machine coordinate feedback-[WLFQD]LowerDL00020하한치[WLFQD]UpperDL00022상한치MB076019STR1 Z Carry In Vacuum Retry PosNL25388/343[ MB076019 ].../0181wEND_IF5490/347END5591/348P00008  H50.28 : Position Status_Unit8 (STR1)  H50.28 : Position Status_Unit8 (STR1)  P00008
